title: AI Workforce Build State
description: Tracks the post-interview build of every department + role so the build can be autonomously resumed if an agent session is interrupted. Lives at /data/.openclaw/workspace/.workforce-build-state.json (VPS) or ~/.openclaw/workspace/.workforce-build-state.json (Mac). Written by the agent at interview-completion AND after every unit of build work completes. Extended in v10.14.17 to also track the post-build CLOSEOUT pipeline (Skill 37 ZHC Closeout).

ownerChat.description: Owner Telegram chat ID for final status message

companyName.description: Client's company name — used by Skill 37 in prompts + Notion page titles

industry.description: Client's industry — used by Skill 37 to pick example tasks

buildPid.description: Optional lock token to prevent concurrent builds

filesPlanned.description: Expected file list (e.g. README.md, AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, USER.md, MEMORY.md, HEARTBEAT.md)

agentRegistered.description: True only when a corresponding entry exists in openclaw.json agents.list[] with id == 'dept-<slug>'. Materialized by Skill 32's materialize-dept-agents.sh. A dept with status=done but agentRegistered=false is a LIE — the role-definition.md files exist but the OpenClaw runtime sees no such agent. Added v10.14.19.

roleLibraryFilled.description: True only when EVERY role folder in this dept has its how-to.md filled from the role library (carries the '<!-- Filled from role-library v' marker), as verified by qc-completeness.sh (library_pct == 100). A dept with status=done but roleLibraryFilled=false is INCOMPLETE — the role scaffolds exist but the role library was never pulled in. Added v10.15.8. ENFORCED: see roleLibraryStatus + the verify/resume gate.

sopLibraryFilled.description: True only when EVERY role folder in this dept has its SOP files authored/pulled (no remaining 'to be personalized' stubs), as verified by qc-completeness.sh (sop_stubs_remaining == 0 and avg_sop_per_role > 0). A dept with status=done but sopLibraryFilled=false is INCOMPLETE — the SOP placeholders were never authored. Added v10.15.8. ENFORCED: see sopLibraryStatus + the verify/resume gate.

agentsMaterializedCount.description: Count of dept entries actually present in openclaw.json agents.list[] (excludes the default 'main'). Written by Skill 37 Step 1 after running materialize-dept-agents.sh. Cross-check against the number of departments where status==done — a mismatch means the closeout MUST fail rather than send a celebration the runtime can't back up. Added v10.14.19.

openItems.description: Free-form notes about post-build cleanup, e.g. 'Vertical Pack confirmation pending', 'HITMCN merger decision pending'

resumeAttempts.description: Count of autonomous resume invocations. Capped at maxResumeAttempts to prevent infinite loops.

maxResumeAttempts.description: Hard cap. After this, resume-workforce-build.sh stops self-pinging and notifies Trevor instead of the owner.

roleLibraryStatus.description: ENFORCED build gate (added v10.15.8). Tracks whether the ROLE LIBRARY has been pulled into every role folder (how-to.md filled from templates/role-library/ via post-build-role-workspaces.py). Set to 'pending' the moment the build starts; 'pulling' while post-build augmentation runs; 'done' only when qc-completeness.sh reports library_pct == 100 across ALL on-disk depts (every per-dept roleLibraryFilled == true); 'failed' if the pull errored or coverage < 100. A workforce is NOT complete (buildCompletedAt MUST NOT be set, closeout MUST NOT fire) until roleLibraryStatus == done. The resume cron fires a [LIBRARY-RESUME] self-ping while this is pending/pulling/failed. Last-night incident (Kofi/Teresa/Evelyn/Maria/Lyric): workforces were scaffolded but the role library was never connected — this field + gate prevent that.

sopLibraryStatus.description: ENFORCED build gate (added v10.15.8). Tracks whether the SOP LIBRARY has been authored/pulled for every role (SOP files written, no 'to be personalized' stubs remaining), via populate-sops-from-manifest.py. Set to 'pending' at build start; 'authoring' while SOP population runs; 'done' only when qc-completeness.sh reports sop_stubs_remaining == 0 and avg_sop_per_role > 0 across ALL on-disk depts (every per-dept sopLibraryFilled == true); 'failed' if population errored or stubs remain. A workforce is NOT complete until sopLibraryStatus == done. The resume cron fires a [LIBRARY-RESUME] self-ping while this is pending/authoring/failed. Same last-night incident class as roleLibraryStatus.

libraryFailureReason.description: Captures the specific reason role/SOP library population failed or is incomplete (e.g. 'role-library: marketing 4/12 how-to.md filled', 'sop: 18 stubs remaining', 'populate-sops-from-manifest.py rc=3 owner-input-required'). Added v10.15.8.

librariesNearCapNotified.description: Throttle flag (added v10.15.9). Set true the FIRST time resume-workforce-build.sh emits an OPERATOR-FACING 'library gate not closing' status line — i.e. when the libraries are still dirty AND resumeAttempts has reached within 2 of maxResumeAttempts. Surfacing this near-cap (instead of only at the hard cap) makes a persistently-failing role-library/SOP pull visible before the cron stops retrying. Once true, the status is not re-emitted on every remaining cycle.

commsAutomationStatus.description: ENFORCED cross-skill chain to Skill 38 (added v10.15.9). When the built workforce includes a Communications, Sales, or Customer-Support department, the closeout MUST hand off to Skill 38 (conversational AI system) to scaffold the matching comms automations — the same enforcement shape as the role/SOP library gate (state field + verify/resume self-ping), NOT prose. Set by the Skill 23 master orchestrator at Moment 3.8 once all departments are done: 'not-applicable' if NONE of Communications/Sales/Customer-Support was built (no comms department => no handoff needed); otherwise 'pending'. Skill 38 transitions pending → scaffolding → done. 'done' ONLY when the client's conversation-workflows/ has at least the appointment-booking starter playbook + its Build-with-AI prompt registered (THE TRINITY) — verifiable via Skill 38 scripts/qc-trinity-registry.sh. A workforce with a comms/sales/support department but commsAutomationStatus NOT IN {done, not-applicable} is NOT fully delivered — resume-workforce-build.sh treats it as dirty and dispatches a [COMMS-AUTOMATION-RESUME] self-ping. Last-night incident class (siblings with zero cross-references): a Sales/Support workforce shipped with no conversational automations wired.

commsAutomationDepartments.description: The department slugs that triggered the Skill 38 handoff (e.g. ['communications','sales','customer-support']). Written by Skill 23 alongside commsAutomationStatus so the resume self-ping can name exactly which department(s) need comms automations. Added v10.15.9.

commsAutomationVerifiedAt.description: When the Skill 38 trinity check (qc-trinity-registry.sh) last confirmed the matching comms automations are registered. Written when commsAutomationStatus is set to 'done'. Added v10.15.9.

closeoutStatus.description: Skill 37 ZHC Closeout status. Set by Skill 23 master orchestrator to 'pending' the moment buildCompletedAt is written. Skill 37 transitions pending → generating → sent → done. failed = retries exhausted; resume cron will retry. Added in v10.14.17. NOTE (v10.15.8): the master orchestrator MUST NOT write buildCompletedAt or set closeoutStatus=pending until roleLibraryStatus == done AND sopLibraryStatus == done. The library gate runs BEFORE the closeout gate.

closeoutStartedAt.description: When Skill 37 first transitioned pending → generating

closeoutFailureReason.description: Captures the specific step that exhausted retries (e.g. 'command-center: 3 attempts exhausted', 'infographic-1: ...', 'notion: ...')

commandCenterStatus.description: Skill 32 Command Center setup status (tracked by Skill 37 Step 1)

commandCenterUrl.description: Resolved URL of the Command Center (e.g. http://localhost:4000)

n8nStatus.description: n8n integration wire-up status (optional — may be 'skipped' for clients without n8n)

n8nUrl.description: Client's n8n instance URL if wired up

infographic1Url.description: KIE.AI-returned URL for the Workforce Structure infographic

infographic2Url.description: KIE.AI-returned URL for the How Work Flows infographic

celebrationVideoUrl.description: KIE.AI Veo 3.1-returned URL for the celebration video

notionRootPageUrl.description: URL of the root Notion closeout page in the client's workspace

messagesDelivered.description: Per-message Telegram delivery tracker for Step 6 of Skill 37. Tracks which of the 6 messages [1..6] have been successfully delivered. Used for idempotent retries of partial deliveries.

interviewProgress.description: Per-question state updated by update-interview-state.sh. Source of truth for the resume cron and dashboard interview-progress UI. Added in v10.15.1 (VPS) / v10.14.1 (Mac).

lastQuestionNumber.description: DEPRECATED v10.15.1 / v10.14.1. Use interviewProgress.lastQuestionNumber. Kept tolerated for legacy state files.
